info.subtitle: Help shape the Nasun ecosystem.
info.description:
The Community Leaderboard recognizes thoughtful, creative contributions that expand understanding of Nasun's live infrastructure and products.
Participation is merit-based and content-driven.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Active contributors who create high-quality, original content about Nasun's ecosystem are recognized through:
items: Priority mint eligibility (up to 4 NFTs per wallet, subject to Terms)
Early access to organized testing phases
howItWorks.note: Rewards are based on contribution quality and ecosystem engagement — not on purchases or sales activity.

rewards.title: Ranks & Recognition
rewards.description: Top contributors will be placed into recognition tiers based on contribution quality and consistency.

platinum.name: Platinum
platinum.recognition: USDC reward + 1 Battalion NFT + Priority mint eligibility

gold.name: Gold
gold.recognition: USDC reward + Discounted Battalion NFT eligibility

notes: Final USDC reward amounts will be confirmed prior to distribution. All rewards are funded from Nasun's marketing allocation.
Tier structure and eligibility criteria are fixed at leaderboard launch.

evaluation.title: How Contributions Are Evaluated
items: Thoughtful analysis of Nasun's products and architecture
Educational threads or videos explaining ecosystem components
evaluation.qualityNote: Engagement quality matters more than volume.
evaluation.warning: Automated engagement, spam, or inauthentic amplification will result in removal.

compliance.title: Transparency & Compliance
paragraphs: Rewards are provided as marketing compensation for content contributions. Participants receiving compensation must clearly disclose their relationship with Nasun in accordance with applicable advertising and disclosure laws, including #ad or #sponsored where required.
No participant may make financial return claims about the Battalion NFT or any Nasun product. The Battalion NFT is a digital membership product and not an investment.
Nasun reserves the right to remove participants who violate these standards.
